use_cases: Submit buttons that transition to loading states with smooth morphing animation
Interactive call-to-action elements with fluid width transitions
Form submission buttons with visual feedback during async operations
Icon-enhanced buttons with optional loading indicators
Variant-based button systems for primary, secondary, and ghost actions
ai_summary: A specialized animated button component that performs a fluid width morph transition between its standard text state and a circular loading spinner state. Built with motion/react and physics-based spring animations for a smooth, jitter-free effect. Supports multiple variants (primary, secondary, ghost), optional icons, and customizable loading states with a signature fluid feel created through low stiffness and high damping values.
